title: Surgeon Vacancy at Thyrocare Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Thyrocare Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Thyrocare Digital Technologies:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare Digital Technologies!
